text: Done when gap records live under .lume/gaps/ (co-located with all other lume state) instead of repo-root gaps/: gap.py's gaps_dir points at .lume/gaps/, the adopter scan (adopters.py) reads .lume/gaps/ from cloned adopter repos, add/list/scan/resolve all work against the new location, any existing repo-root gaps are migrated or handled with a documented fallback, all docs that describe the gaps/ convention (module docstrings, README, SKILL.md, ADOPTERS-facing text) are updated consistently, and the full test suite is green with tests asserting the new path. Decision logged recording the relocation rationale (state co-location over the original one-file-PR-at-root discoverability argument) and whether a legacy-path fallback is kept.
title: Relocate gaps from repo-root gaps/ to .lume/gaps/
